notes: Order facts should resolve to customer dimension.
Order item facts should resolve to order header.
Order item facts should resolve to product dimension.
Returns should map back to transacted order items.
Campaign targeting should resolve to campaign metadata.
Events should map to targeted campaign assignments.
Store channel orders should have a store id.
Store ids in orders should resolve to store dimension.
Inventory snapshots should resolve to products.
Price snapshots should resolve to products.
